questions.q: The 'One Rank, One Pension' scheme is a significant initiative of which government?
questions.answer: The 'One Rank, One Pension' scheme is a significant initiative of the NDA government.

questions.q: What is the significance of 'National Population Policy, 2000'?
questions.answer: The National Population Policy, 2000 aims at achieving replacement level of fertility rate of 2.1 by 2010, ensuring universal access to reproductive health services, and empowering women.

NITI Aayog is a policy think tank of the Government of India. It was established in 2015 as a replacement for the Planning Commission. It aims to foster cooperative federalism, promote economic growth, and improve governance.

questions.q: What is the impact of 'Demonetization' on the Indian economy?
questions.answer: Demonetization has both positive and negative impacts on the Indian economy. On the positive side, it reduced black money, increased digital transactions, and promoted economic growth. On the negative side, it caused economic disruption, loss of jobs, and a decline in economic growth.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: The 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' scheme was launched in _______________________.
True or False: The 'Make in India' initiative aims to increase foreign investment in India.
What is the significance of 'Swachh Bharat Abhiyan'?
questions.answer: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan is a government-led cleanliness campaign that aims to make India a clean and hygienic country. It focuses on improving sanitation, waste management, and public toilets.

questions.q: Explain the concept of 'Smart Cities Mission'.
questions.answer: Smart Cities Mission is an urban development initiative that aims to create 100 smart cities in India. It focuses on improving the quality of life, promoting sustainable development, and enhancing civic amenities.

questions.q: What is the impact of 'GST' on the Indian economy?
questions.answer: GST has a positive impact on the Indian economy. It has reduced tax rates, increased tax compliance, and promoted economic growth. However, it has also caused initial disruption, loss of jobs, and a decline in economic growth.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: The 'Digital India' initiative was launched in _______________________.
